nasb.text: Nevertheless, as the Lord God of Israel lives, who has restrained me from harming you, unless you had come quickly to meet me, surely there would not have been left to Nabal until the morning light as much as one male.”

esv.text: For as surely as the Lord, the God of Israel, lives, who has restrained me from hurting you, unless you had hurried and come to meet me, truly by morning there had not been left to Nabal so much as one male.”

cnv.text: 我指著那攔阻了我加害你的永活的耶和華以色列的　神起誓，如果你不及時來迎見我，到明天早晨，拿八所有的男丁必不留一個。”

ccb.text: 我凭阻止我杀你的以色列的上帝——永活的耶和华起誓，若不是你赶来迎接我，拿八家中不会有一个男子活到明天早上。”
